def positive_dataclass_mutable_default_without_default_factory():
    rule_id = "dataclass_mutable_default_without_default_factory"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag dataclass fields that use mutable defaults without default_factory."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
